series_metadata.series_title: Money Follows the Person (MFP) Policy, Training, and Development
series_metadata.series_description: Rules, policy and program development files for the Money Follows the Person (MFP) Project which provides home and community based alternatives to institutional long term care. Includes policy drafts,Amendments, copies of published rules, policy applications, monitoring reports and related correspondence. Training documentations for case management contractors, HOME Choice- MFP Project and County Departments of Job & Family Services. Files include by are not limited to agendas, roster, handouts, training development notes and manuals, presentations and evaluations of training on Consumer case management, new forms, care of consumers and provider training.

retention_rules.trigger_event: Paper: in office ; Electronic: in office
